files.name: gear_sun.dxf
files.description: Sun gear from a planetary gearset, generated by py_gear_gen (involute spur gear). 88KB of DXF arcs and polylines.

files.name: gear_planet.dxf
files.description: Planet gear from a planetary gearset. Involute spur gear profile with rich DXF arc geometry.

files.name: gear_ring.dxf
files.description: Ring (annular/internal) gear from a planetary gearset. Interior teeth on circular outer boundary.

files.name: gear_sun.svg
files.description: Sun gear SVG - dense path data of involute tooth profiles. Generated by py_gear_gen Python library.

files.name: gear_planet.svg
files.description: Planet gear SVG - involute spur gear profile with high arc resolution path data.

files.name: gear_ring.svg
files.description: Ring (internal) gear SVG - annular gear with internal tooth profile paths.

files.name: gear_involute_08t.dxf
files.description: 8-tooth involute gear at 14.5 degree pressure angle. From koppi/involute-gear-collection on GitHub.

files.name: gear_involute_12t.dxf
files.description: 12-tooth involute gear at 14.5 degree pressure angle.

files.name: gear_involute_16t.dxf
files.description: 16-tooth involute gear at 14.5 degree pressure angle.

files.name: gear_involute_20t.dxf
files.description: 20-tooth involute gear at 14.5 degree pressure angle.

files.name: gear_involute_32t.dxf
files.description: 32-tooth involute gear at 14.5 degree pressure angle.

files.name: gear_8t.dxf
files.description: 8-tooth spur gear from samuelbrian/gears. Converted from Solid Edge, cleaned in Inkscape. High-quality DXF.

files.name: gear_20t.dxf
files.description: 20-tooth spur gear from samuelbrian/gears.

files.name: gear_64t.dxf
files.description: 64-tooth spur gear from samuelbrian/gears. Large gear with highly detailed involute tooth profiles.

files.name: gear_RACKt.dxf
files.description: Gear rack (linear gear) from samuelbrian/gears. Linear tooth profile used in rack-and-pinion systems.

files.name: bearings.dxf
files.description: Bearing profiles DXF from samuelbrian/gears. Cross-section drawings of ball/roller bearings.

files.name: gear_template.dxf
files.description: Gear template DXF from samuelbrian/gears. Base template geometry for CAD gear layouts.

files.name: gear_samuelbrian_20t.svg
files.description: 20-tooth spur gear SVG from samuelbrian/gears. Clean vector profile suitable for animation.

files.name: gear_samuelbrian_32t.svg
files.description: 32-tooth spur gear SVG from samuelbrian/gears.

files.name: gear_samuelbrian_64t.svg
files.description: 64-tooth spur gear SVG from samuelbrian/gears.

files.name: printer_frame.dxf
files.description: Prusa i3 3D printer frame laser-cut DXF, 6mm material. Full structural frame with brackets, slots, and mounting holes.

files.name: printer_frame_mini.dxf
files.description: Mini Prusa i3 printer frame laser-cut DXF. Structural plate with cutouts, slots, and bolt patterns.

files.name: raspberry_pi_mechanical.dxf
files.description: Raspberry Pi mechanical drawing DXF from LMN-3 synthesizer MCAD. Enclosure plate with mounting holes and cutouts.

files.name: robot_arm_mearm_v3.dxf
files.description: MeArm V3 open-source robot arm full laser-cut DXF. Multi-part sheet with brackets, servo mounts, arm linkages, and shoulder plate.

files.name: wheel_mount.dxf
files.description: Wheel mount calibration plate DXF from Basebot robot platform. Acrylic plate with wheel and motor mounting holes.

files.name: robot_accessories.svg
files.description: Robot accessories SVG from Basebot project. Laser-cut acrylic parts for a wheeled robot chassis including mounts and brackets.

files.name: spur_gear_18t.svg
files.description: 18-tooth spur gear technical drawing SVG from Wikimedia Commons (public domain). Created by Inductiveload with Solid Edge and Inkscape. Accurate involute tooth profile.

files.name: technical_drawing_hole.svg
files.description: Technical engineering drawing of a hole per German standard DIN. Wikimedia Commons CC0. Shows cross-section with centerlines and dimension annotations.

files.name: flange_screw_head.svg
files.description: 12-spline flange screw head profile SVG from Wikimedia Commons. Minimal but valid vector geometry of a flange drive screw head.

files.name: four_pulleys.svg
files.description: Four pulley mechanical advantage diagram SVG from Wikimedia Commons. Shows block-and-tackle pulley system with wheels, ropes, and load geometry.

files.name: switchifier_case.svg
files.description: Switchifier NodeMCU electronics enclosure laser-cut SVG from Tog Hackerspace. Box panel with slots, tabs, and cutouts for circuit board mounting.

sources: github.com/heartworm/py_gear_gen - planetary gear set (sun, planet, ring) DXF + SVG
github.com/koppi/involute-gear-collection - involute gears at 14.5deg pressure angle, 5 tooth counts
github.com/samuelbrian/gears - spur gears (8t, 20t, 64t, rack) DXF + SVG, plus bearings and template
github.com/sgraber/Prusa3_LC - Prusa i3 printer frame laser-cut plates
github.com/MeArm/MeArm - open-source robot arm (brackets, servo mounts, linkages)
github.com/ApproxEng/basebot - robot wheel mount plate DXF + accessories SVG
upload.wikimedia.org - spur gear 18t, technical drawing hole, flange screw head, four pulleys
categories: gears (involute spur gears, planetary gears, rack gear)
structural frames and plates with holes
